title: Open Sourse & AI Automation Workshop
excerpt: The session focused on Open Sourse and AI Automation, where we explored Git and GitHub workflows, real open-source contribution practices, n8n-based automation, and shared practical project ideas that students can continue building on beyond the workshop.
author: Abijith U
content: In-depth guide on AI Automation and Open Source...

title: Tech Sprint' 26
excerpt: The TechSprint Hackathon journey has come to a successful close, and it has truly been an inspiring experience from start to finish. With 500+ teams registered and nearly 50 teams shortlisted, TechSprint witnessed incredible innovation, dedication, and problem-solving spirit from students. Congratulations to every team that participated and put in the effort - reaching this stage itself is an achievement.
author: Subhashree B

title: From Ground to Cloud: Build Your Cloud foundation
excerpt: Ground to cloud, an interactive cloud foundation workshop with handson AWS demo focusing on building s strong cloud foundation.
author: Subhashree B
content: Ground to cloud, an interactive cloud foundation workshop
